metadata.book_title: Brihat Parasara Hora Sastra Vol 2 By Maharishi Parashara

content_blocks.text:
Brihat Parasara Hora Sastra

Brihat Parasara Hora Sastra

एवं राहोश्च केतोश्च कथयामि गृहादिकम् ।
तयोईशाफलञ्चैव तत्राग्रे द्विजन्दन ॥१३४॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
एवं राहोश्च केतोश्च कथयामि गृहादिकम् ।
तयोईशाफलञ्चैव तत्राग्रे द्विजन्दन ॥१३४॥
verse_data.topic: Introduction to Rahu and Ketu's rulership

content_blocks.text:
राहोस्तु वृषभं केतोर्विश्चिकं तुडसंज्ञकम् ।
मूलत्रिकोणं ज्ञेयं युग्मं चापं क्रमेण च ॥१३५॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
राहोस्तु वृषभं केतोर्विश्चिकं तुडसंज्ञकम् ।
मूलत्रिकोणं ज्ञेयं युग्मं चापं क्रमेण च ॥१३५॥
verse_data.topic: Exaltation and Moolatrikona signs of Rahu and Ketu

content_blocks.text:
कुम्भाली च गृही प्रोक्तो कन्या-मीनो च केनचित् ।
तदाये बहुसारल्यं च धनधान्यादिसम्पदाम् ॥१३६॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
कुम्भाली च गृही प्रोक्तो कन्या-मीनो च केनचित् ।
तदाये बहुसारल्यं च धनधान्यादिसम्पदाम् ॥१३६॥
verse_data.topic: Own signs of Rahu and Ketu, and their general results

content_blocks.text:
वाहने पुत्रसम्भ वः ।
नवनगृहनिर्माणं धर्मचिन्ता महोत्सवः ॥१३७॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
वाहने पुत्रसम्भ वः ।
नवनगृहनिर्माणं धर्मचिन्ता महोत्सवः ॥१३७॥
verse_data.topic: Results related to vehicles, children, house construction, religious matters, and festivals
Results related to foreign honor, clothing, ornaments, and auspicious conjunctions

content_blocks.text:
केन्द्रिकोणलाभं वा दुश्चिक्ये शुभराशिगे ।
महाराजप्रसादेन सर्वसम्पत्सुखं लभम् ॥१३९॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
केन्द्रिकोणलाभं वा दुश्चिक्ये शुभराशिगे ।
महाराजप्रसादेन सर्वसम्पत्सुखं लभम् ॥१३९॥
verse_data.topic: Results related to Kendra, Kona, Labha houses and auspicious signs
Results related to Yavanas and auspicious events at home

content_blocks.text: O Brahmin! Now I explain the signs etc., of Rahu and Ketu so that I can disclose the results of their Dasa before you. The exaltation signs of Rahu is Scorpio and for Ketu it is Taurus and the Moola Trikona signs are respectively Sagittarius and Gemini. Own sign of Rahu is Aquarius and of Ketu is Scorpio. Some have reckoned Virgo and Pisces signs respectively. If Rahu is exalted in the nativity, its Dasa will be extremely favourable and wealth, prosperity etc., is attained. Ambitions are accomplished through friends and king (Government), possibility of conveyance and son, construction of new residence, religious feelings, festivity, Royal recognition in the foreign land, decorative items, Jewellery etc., are also achieved. If Rahu is also aspected by and in conjunction with the benefic planets, positied in Angles, Trines the 11th or the 3rd house and with auspicious sign, property, land etc. and happiness is achieved with the blessing of king. Also recognition from the head of the family and welfare of house become possible.

verse_data.translation: O Brahmin! Now I explain the signs etc., of Rahu and Ketu so that I can disclose the results of their Dasa before you. The exaltation signs of Rahu is Scorpio and for Ketu it is Taurus and the Moola Trikona signs are respectively Sagittarius and Gemini. Own sign of Rahu is Aquarius and of Ketu is Scorpio. Some have reckoned Virgo and Pisces signs respectively. If Rahu is exalted in the nativity, its Dasa will be extremely favourable and wealth, prosperity etc., is attained. Ambitions are accomplished through friends and king (Government), possibility of conveyance and son, construction of new residence, religious feelings, festivity, Royal recognition in the foreign land, decorative items, Jewellery etc., are also achieved. If Rahu is also aspected by and in conjunction with the benefic planets, positied in Angles, Trines the 11th or the 3rd house and with auspicious sign, property, land etc. and happiness is achieved with the blessing of king. Also recognition from the head of the family and welfare of house become possible.

content_blocks.text: Notes: Rahu represents foreign and other religions. Therefore, in favourable time, the native makes profits from the sovereign and that too through a person of a different religion.

Bombay's publication of the treatise cites some more results. Such as, the major period of Rahu, brings about beneficence, expansion of kingdom, spreading of religion, pilgrimage, higher knowledge and dominance. Travelling abroad is also stated to be on card.

raw_text:
Brihat Parasara Hora Sastra
एवं राहोश्च केतोश्च कथयामि गृहादिकम् ।
तयोईशाफलञ्चैव तत्राग्रे द्विजन्दन ॥१३४॥
राहोस्तु वृषभं केतोर्विश्चिकं तुडसंज्ञकम् ।
मूलत्रिकोणं ज्ञेयं युग्मं चापं क्रमेण च ॥१३५॥
कुम्भाली च गृही प्रोक्तो कन्या-मीनो च केनचित् ।
तदाये बहुसारल्यं च धनधान्यादिसम्पदाम् ॥१३६॥
वाहने पुत्रसम्भ वः ।
नवनगृहनिर्माणं धर्मचिन्ता महोत्सवः ॥१३७॥
विदेशराजसन्मानं वस्त्राडारभूषणम् ।
शुभयुक्ते शुभदृष्टे योगकारकसंयुते ॥१३८॥
केन्द्रिकोणलाभं वा दुश्चिक्ये शुभराशिगे ।
महाराजप्रसादेन सर्वसम्पत्सुखं लभम् ॥१३९॥
यवनप्रभसम्बन्धं  गृहे कल्याणसम्भ वम् ॥१३९½॥
123
34-39-1/2: O Brahmin! Now I explain the signs etc., of Rahu
and Ketu so that I can disclose the results of their Dasa before you.
The exaltation signs of Rahu is Scorpio and for Ketu it is Taurus and
the Moola Trikona signs are respectively Sagittarius and Gemini.
Own sign of Rahu is Aquarius and of Ketu is Scorpio. Some have
reckoned Virgo and Pisces signs respectively. If Rahu is exalted in
the nativity, its Dasa will be extremely favourable and wealth,
prosperity etc., is attained. Ambitions are accomplished through
friends and king (Government), possibility of conveyance and son,
construction of new residence, religious feelings, festivity, Royal
recognition in the foreign land, decorative items, Jewellery etc., are
also achieved. If Rahu is also aspected by and in conjunction with
the benefic planets, positied in Angles, Trines the 11th or the 3rd
house and with auspicious sign, property, land etc. and happiness
is achieved with the blessing of king. Also recognition from the head
of the family and welfare of house become possible.
Notes: Rahu represents foreign and other religions. Therefore,
in favourable time, the native makes profits from the sovereign and that
too through a person of a different religion.
Bombay's publication of the treatise cites some more results.
Such as, the major period of Rahu, brings about beneficence, expansion
of kingdom, spreading of religion, pilgrimage, higher knowledge and
dominance. Travelling abroad is also stated to be on card.
